title: ENTRY
summary: Residential and community access control system. Has its own Supabase project. Brain may reference ENTRY decisions and architecture but must not read ENTRY operational data.

title: Seshat
summary: Financial operating system for freelancers, developers, and small studios. Has its own Supabase project. Brain does not store Seshat operational data.

title: Minerva Web
summary: Public website for Minerva Technologies. Surface for product marketing and lead capture.

title: Minerva Core Brain
summary: Internal intelligence layer for Minerva: knowledge, decisions, prompts, agents, and inbox. v0 is Git-backed; v1 moves to Neon. Lives under app/(console)/brain in Minerva Console.
